from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    """Test that process_batch processes all items, including the last one."""
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    result = process_batch(items)
    
    expected = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected length {len(items)}, got {len(result)}"
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"
